children.text: to repay (by direct payments on behalf of the participating employee) all or any portion of a student loan previously taken out by the employee;

to make direct payments to an educational institution on behalf of a participating employee or to reimburse a participating employee for all or any portion of any tuition or related educational expenses paid by the employee.

children.heading: Special rules for student loan repayments
children.label: b Special rules for student loan repayments

children.heading: Application of regulations under executive branch program
children.label: 1 Application of regulations under executive branch program
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a)(1), the Chief of the Capitol Police may, by regulation, make applicable such provisions of as the Chief determines necessary to provide for such program.section 5379 of title 5

children.heading: Restrictions on prior reimbursements
children.label: 2 Restrictions on prior reimbursements
children.text: The Capitol Police may not reimburse any individual under subsection (a)(1) for any repayments made by the individual prior to entering into an agreement with the Capitol Police to participate in the program under this section.

children.heading: Use of recovered amounts
children.label: 3 Use of recovered amounts
children.text: Any amount repaid by, or recovered from, an individual under subsection (a)(1) and its implementing regulations shall be credited to the appropriation account available for salaries or general expenses of the Capitol Police at the time of repayment or recovery. Such credited amount may be used for any authorized purpose of the account and shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Limit on amount of payments
children.label: c Limit on amount of payments
children.text: The total amount paid by the Capitol Police with respect to any individual under the program under this section may not exceed $80,000.

children.heading: No review of determinations
children.label: d No review of determinations
children.text: Any determination made under the program under this section shall not be reviewable or appealable in any manner.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: e Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2003 and each succeeding fiscal year.
